name: nahids-superpowers
description: Practical AI skills for turning real work into clearer decisions, useful assets, and reusable systems.

interface.shortDescription: Practical AI skills for real work.
interface.longDescription: A growing collection of native skills for setting up AI, mining meetings, making decisions, explaining ideas, producing useful content, and turning repeated tasks into reusable systems.
defaultPrompt: Find the right superpower for the job I need to do.
Turn these meeting notes into decisions and the next deliverable.
Help me set up AI so it understands how I work.
